calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Text Ruling

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Continued To May-11-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment. Short Cause Trial/No appearance by Defendant(s):
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Carlos F. Negrete, Esq., appearing Plaintiff SHU MEI FANG.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant YUE QIU, an individual.
Plaintiff Shu Mei Fang sworn and examined on her own behalf.
Defendants Does 1 t0 100 dismissed without prejudice.
The Following Exhbits were introduced by the Plaintiff and marked as follows:
Exhibit 1. Copy of Quitclaim Deed. Id/Evidence.
Exhibit 2. Copy of Buyer's Closing Statement. Id/Evidence.
Exhibit 3. Copy of EastWest Bank Payoff Statement dated 3/2/15. Id/Evidence.
Exhibit 4. Copy of Wire Transfer Services. Id/Evidence.
Court ordered matter continued to May 11, 2015. Counsel to file further documentation in support or request of Attorney's fees and Request for punitive damages.
Counsel to submit a propoded Judgment.
The court will review documentation and sign Judgment without hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-24-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Set For Trial On Apr-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF SHU FANG's MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar per stipulation. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
